name: Jellyfin Helper
description: Cleans up orphaned .trickplay folders and empty media folders. Provides a comprehensive media statistics dashboard with storage overview, codec/quality analysis (donut charts), library health checks, and per-library breakdowns.
overview: Automated cleanup tasks + media statistics dashboard with codec analysis, health checks, and storage breakdown.

versions.changelog: Renamed to Jellyfin Helper. Added comprehensive media statistics dashboard with codec/quality donut charts, resolution breakdown, library health checks (missing subtitles/artwork/NFO, orphaned metadata), storage distribution bar, and per-library breakdown table. Fully responsive UI. Trickplay folder cleanup, empty media folder cleanup, dry-run modes.
